title: Shift Totem
description: Press Shift+LMB and the totem of undying will move to your left hand.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b338ab2124c5ed830730d8ec4dd8b3e12d7c33c3.png)
![shift](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbb21b7a83be5edf8400bf31bb5e5d8c3701d4d0.png)
Tired of manually dragging Totems of Undying during an intense battle? Shift Totem is a lightweight utility mod designed to streamline your gameplay and keep you alive when every second counts.

**This mod adds a Quick Totem feature. While in your inventory, simply Shift + Left Click to move a totem to your hand. This mod will help you in PvP and regular gameplay. Enjoy!!!**
> ### IMPORTANT
> - ### **Is there a port on the Bedrock Edition?**
>   This mod is designed exclusively for Java Edition. We do not plan to release a version for Bedrock Edition.
> - ### **Want to use it on Bedrock Edition?** 
>   You can port the mod yourself, as long as you comply with all license terms.
> 
![shift](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbb21b7a83be5edf8400bf31bb5e5d8c3701d4d0.png)
